im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/config.general_idea: Replace custom Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer configuration with GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer to reduce boilerplate and improve type safety.
Remove imports for Jackson classes and Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer that are no longer used after switching to GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/config.human_impl: Removed imports for JsonAutoDetect, PropertyAccessor, ObjectMapper, and Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer.

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/contro.general_idea: Implement a new endpoint to generate QR codes for authentication and store their initial state in Redis.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/contro.human_impl: @GetMapping("/qrcode") public Map<String, String> qrcode(@RequestParam("qrcode") String qrcode) { ... redisUtil.set(code, qrCodeInfo, 3, TimeUnit.MINUTES); ... }

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/contro.general_idea: Implement a new endpoint to handle QR code scanning events and update the status in Redis.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/contro.human_impl: @PostMapping("/qrcode/scan") public ResponseEntity<Map<String, Object>> handleScan(@RequestBody Map<String, Object> map) { ... redisUtil.set(redisKey, qrCodeInfo, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS); ... }

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/contro.general_idea: Implement a new endpoint to check the current login status of a QR code and generate temporary credentials if scanned.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/contro.human_impl: @GetMapping("/qrcode/status") public ResponseEntity<?> checkLoginStatus(@RequestParam("qrcode") String qrcode) { ... return ResponseEntity.ok(qrCodeInfo); }

Rename field 'user_sex' to 'userSex' to follow Java camelCase naming conventions.
Rename field 'birth_day' to 'birthDay' to follow Java camelCase naming conventions.
Rename field 'self_signature' to 'selfSignature' to follow Java camelCase naming conventions.

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.general_idea: Rename entity fields from snake_case to camelCase to adhere to Java naming conventions while preserving database column mapping via annotations.
Removed the password field from the user data entity.
Renamed userSex to gender and updated the corresponding database column mapping.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.human_impl: Changed @TableField(value = "user_sex") private Integer userSex; to @TableField(value = "gender") private Integer gender;

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.general_idea: Renamed birthDay to birthday and updated the corresponding database column mapping.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.human_impl: Changed @TableField(value = "birth_day") private String birthDay; to @TableField(value = "birthday") private String birthday;

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.general_idea: Added descriptive comments for avatar and gender fields.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.human_impl: Added /** * 头像 */ and /** * 性别 */ comments.

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.general_idea: Move static final constants to the top of the class for better code organization and readability.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.human_impl: Moved KEY_SIZE and RSA_DIR declarations before instance fields.

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.general_idea: Remove unnecessary blank lines between field declarations to compact the class structure.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.human_impl: Deleted empty lines separating secret, publicKeyStr, privateKeyStr, publicKey, and privateKey fields.

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.general_idea: Correct excessive whitespace in an assignment statement to adhere to standard formatting conventions.
Inject redisUtil into QrScanAuthenticationProvider constructor to support new functionality.
Mark constructor-injected fields as final to enforce immutability and improve code safety.
Reverse string comparison to prevent potential NullPointerException if the token variable is null.
Replace isEmpty with hasText to consistently check for null, empty, or whitespace-only strings.
Removed the unused import for ObjectMapper to clean up the code.
Changed the authentication type constant for QR code login from 'qrcode' to 'scan'.
Replaced method call on request object with string literal comparison for better practice.
Removed extra blank lines and adjusted spacing for consistent code style.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.human_impl: Removed empty lines before comments and fixed spacing in method signature.

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.general_idea: Remove the unused import statement for JsonUtil to clean up the code.
